nasb.text: For You have established for Yourself Your people Israel as Your own people forever, and You, O Lord, have become their God.

esv.text: And you established for yourself your people Israel to be your people forever. And you, O Lord, became their God.

cnv.text: 你為自己堅立了你的子民以色列，使他們永遠作你的子民；耶和華啊，你也作了他們的　神。

ccb.text: 你让以色列人永远做你的子民，你耶和华做他们的上帝。
